title: Better Birch Forest
description: Better Birch Forest adds new vegetation and more Saturatet colors to the Birch Forest. Also it adds Fireflys
body:
# Better Birch Forest

This mod aims to bring the missing Birch Forest update to life, inspired by the concept art from Minecraft Live. It also enhances the ambiance of Birch Forests by introducing **Fireflies** to make them feel more vibrant.

## New World Generation
- Redesigned **Birch Trees** with unique shapes.
- Added **Fallen Birch Stems** to create a more natural, aged forest look.

## New Blocks
- **Two New Flowers**:
  Versatile flowers that can grow both on land and in water.
  ![the two new flowers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b3f64433733b968991b86925f0b6038f57e5699_0.webp)
- **Glow in the Dark Block**: 
  This block charges when exposed to light and emits a glow in darkness until its charge depletes.
- **Holed Logs**: 
  Introduced the **Holed Birch Log** and similar variants for other wood types, each featuring a hollow center.
  ![all the holed logs with two waterlogged](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22d28890960b1b736b194bef2c82f0f53b4f92e3.jpeg)
- **Walled Mushroom**: A new type of mushroom that grows on the sides of Birch trees, adding a unique forest feature.
- **Firefly Bottle**: A decorative block that lets you place bottles filled with captured Fireflies, adding a magical glow to your surroundings.

## New Items
- **Firefly Goo**: A new resource dropped by Fireflies with potential crafting or decorative uses.
- **Net Catcher**: A net you can Craft to catch Fireflys in the night

This mod seeks to enhance the Birch Forest experience, making it feel more alive and visually diverse.
